query: I am 25 years old and single. Which health insurance should I buy?
gold_answer: Hello! Based on the information provided, I recommend the Bronze Health Plan. It is suitable because you are single, likely need basic health protection, and want affordable coverage. Coverage: ₹5 Lakhs. Premium: ₹500/month.

query: I am married and have two children. Which health plan is suitable?
gold_answer: Hello! Based on your family profile, I recommend the Gold Health Plan. A family of four needs higher coverage and broader hospitalization protection. Coverage: ₹25 Lakhs. Premium: ₹2000/month.

query: I am 32 and recently married. No children yet. Which health plan should I take?
gold_answer: Hello! Based on your profile, I recommend the Silver Health Plan. It is better than Bronze for a married user and gives moderate health coverage without the higher Gold premium. Coverage: ₹10 Lakhs. Premium: ₹1000/month.

query: I purchased a new car last week. Which insurance should I take?
gold_answer: Hello! I recommend the Car Protect Plan. It covers own damage, third party liability, and roadside assistance. Coverage: Own Damage + Third Party Liability. Premium: ₹5000/year.

query: I own a flat and want protection from fire and theft. What should I buy?
gold_answer: Hello! I recommend the Home Shield Plan. It protects homeowners against fire, theft, and natural calamities. Coverage: ₹50 Lakhs. Premium: ₹3000/year.

query: I have a wife and one child dependent on me. Do I need term insurance?
gold_answer: Hello! Yes. Based on your dependents, I recommend the Term Secure Plan. It gives pure life cover for family financial security. Coverage: ₹1 Crore. Premium: ₹800/month.

query: Compare Bronze and Gold Health Plans.
gold_answer: Hello! Bronze Health Plan has coverage of ₹5 Lakhs and premium of ₹500/month. Gold Health Plan has coverage of ₹25 Lakhs and premium of ₹2000/month. Gold gives higher family protection, while Bronze is more affordable.

query: Tell me about available health insurance plans.
gold_answer: Hello! Coverwise offers Bronze Health Plan, Silver Health Plan, and Gold Health Plan. Bronze: ₹5 Lakhs at ₹500/month. Silver: ₹10 Lakhs at ₹1000/month. Gold: ₹25 Lakhs at ₹2000/month.

must_not_contain: Term Secure Plan is a health plan
